title: Quiet Place: Hardcore Stealth
description: Immersive stealth mechanics: sound visualization, heavy armor penalties, and smart AI that reacts to noise.
body:
Quiet Place transforms Minecraft into a tactical stealth game. Mobs are no longer all-seeing radars; they listen. Almost every action you take creates a realistic acoustic footprint, visualized in a clean, minimalist HUD.

Features:

Dynamic Sound System (Expanded!): Running, sneaking, eating, opening containers, using doors, taking damage, swimming, and 100+ other interactions now generate noise.

Smart AI & Distractions: Mobs won't attack unless they hear you or see you up close. Throw projectiles to distract them and slip by!

Minimalist HUD: Monitor your action and noise level in real-time in the bottom right corner. Get instant warnings when enemies detect you.

Armor Weight & Stealth Gear: Heavy armor (Iron, Diamond, etc.) makes you 50% louder. Leather Boots reduce noise by 40%. Walk on Wool to be completely silent!

Adrenaline: If your health drops below 3 hearts, your heartbeat becomes loud enough to attract nearby enemies.

Fully Customizable: Adjust every single noise level and detection radius via the new configuration file.
